name: Indicator.types
visual_summary: An indicator component that allows positioning at the top, middle, or bottom and at the start, center, or end.
generation_prompt:

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Indicator/Indicator.types.ts
type Position = 'top' | 'middle' | 'bottom';
type Placement = 'start' | 'center' | 'end';

export type IndicatorPosition = `${Position}-${Placement}`;
